title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
